name: TestGetWaitLinCSErrorData
title: TestGetWaitLinCSErrorData
description: Retrieves the data of a checksum error triggered by the last wait instruction.The second function can only be used for "joined events". The number of the "joined event" (return value of "testJoin...") is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: apEvent
parameters.description: Data structure with the checksum error data.
